sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3107" key="a)kessi/nosos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκεσσί-νοσος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n3107.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">healing disease</tr_>, cj. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.516</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crin.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
